label: Consciousness: Hard Problem
primary_fear: No one can explain why physical processes produce subjective experience — and perhaps no one ever will.

label: Dark Matter Nature
primary_fear: Most of the universe's mass is invisible matter we cannot detect, touch, or explain.

label: Dark Energy
primary_fear: An unknown force is accelerating the universe's expansion toward a cold, empty ending.

label: P versus NP
primary_fear: If solving a problem is as easy as checking a solution, every encryption protecting civilization could collapse.

label: Riemann Hypothesis
primary_fear: Prime numbers may follow a hidden pattern whose discovery would reshape mathematics and cryptography.

label: Protein Folding and Cancer
primary_fear: The misfolding of a protein chain triggers cascades of disease that medicine cannot yet predict or halt.

label: Quantum Gravity
primary_fear: The two best theories of reality — quantum mechanics and general relativity — fundamentally contradict each other.

label: Origin of Life
primary_fear: We do not know how inert chemistry became a living, self-replicating system — and it may have been an accident.

label: Aging Mechanism
primary_fear: The cellular machinery that kills us is still not fully understood — and reversing it may destabilize everything.
recent_film_proof: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button (2008)

label: Prime Number Distribution
primary_fear: The primes — the atoms of mathematics — are distributed by rules no human has fully decoded.

label: Function of Sleep
primary_fear: We spend a third of our lives unconscious and still cannot say definitively why.

label: Placebo Mechanism
primary_fear: Belief alone can trigger measurable biological change, which means the line between real and imagined medicine is unclear.

label: Free Will
primary_fear: If every choice is determined by prior causes, moral responsibility and personal identity dissolve.

label: Arrow of Time
primary_fear: Physics equations work the same forward and backward, yet we cannot reverse time — and no one knows why.

label: Black Hole Information Paradox
primary_fear: Objects destroyed by a black hole may violate the fundamental law that information cannot be destroyed.

label: Turbulence
primary_fear: Fluid turbulence — in blood, in air, in rivers — is so complex that no unified theory predicts it.

label: Glass Physics
primary_fear: Glass is neither liquid nor solid — its disordered atomic structure defies classification and full mathematical description.

label: High-Temperature Superconductor
primary_fear: A material that conducts electricity with zero loss at room temperature would remake civilization — and we cannot yet create it predictably.

label: Navier-Stokes Existence
primary_fear: The equations governing all fluid motion — from ocean currents to blood — may break down in ways mathematicians cannot prevent.

label: Mass Extinction Periodicity
primary_fear: Mass extinctions may recur on a predictable cycle, suggesting a cosmic timer nobody has found.

label: Epigenetic Inheritance
primary_fear: Trauma and environmental damage sustained by parents is chemically encoded into descendants' genes.

label: Gut-Brain Axis
primary_fear: Your bacterial microbiome controls your mood, behavior, and mental clarity without your conscious awareness.

label: Alzheimer's Amyloid Theory
primary_fear: We may have spent fifty years fighting the wrong mechanism, and no therapy will ever work against this disease.

label: Longevity Biomarkers
primary_fear: The tests that predict lifespan accurately exist, but only the wealthy will have access to them.

label: Cancer Immunotherapy Resistance
primary_fear: Tumors are learning to hide from the immune system faster than we can design new therapies.

label: Antibiotic Resistance Crisis
primary_fear: Bacteria are evolving faster than we can produce antibiotics, returning us to a pre-penicillin era.

label: Prion Disease Unknown Reservoir
primary_fear: A slowly transmitted protein misfolding disease could be spreading silently through food and medical procedures.

label: Autism Etiology Unknown
primary_fear: We still don't know what causes autism despite decades of research, suggesting a fundamental gap in neuroscience.

label: Chronic Fatigue Syndrome Pathophysiology
primary_fear: Millions suffer from a disease that medicine dismisses as psychological, with no diagnostic test and no cure.

label: Long COVID Mechanisms
primary_fear: A viral infection can silently damage multiple organs in ways medicine cannot repair.

label: Quantum Biology in Photosynthesis
primary_fear: Living organisms exploit quantum phenomena in ways that violate our understanding of biology.

label: Quantum Effects in Bird Navigation
primary_fear: Birds navigate using sensors attuned to quantum fields that should not be biologically possible.

label: Olfaction Quantum Tunneling
primary_fear: Smell detection may use quantum tunneling, not lock-and-key biochemistry as taught.

label: Anesthesia Mechanism Unknown
primary_fear: We use anesthesia daily yet have no explanation for how it works at the cellular level.

label: Placebo and Nocebo Effects
primary_fear: Belief can literally reshape the body's healing — meaning we have no clean separation between mind and physiology.

label: Pain Chronification Transition
primary_fear: Acute pain transforms into chronic pain through mechanisms we do not understand, and we cannot reverse it.

label: Psychiatric Drug Mechanisms Unknown
primary_fear: Antidepressants, antipsychotics, and mood stabilizers work, but we still don't understand how.

label: Schizophrenia Etiology
primary_fear: We cannot predict who will develop schizophrenia, prevent it, or cure it.

label: Addiction Relapse Neurobiology
primary_fear: The brain remembers addiction at the cellular level, making relapse likely for life.

label: Depression Neuroinflammation Link
primary_fear: Depression may be an immune system response to infection, meaning current treatment is missing the root cause.

label: Memory Consolidation Timescale
primary_fear: Traumatic memories form faster and more durably than we thought, and reconsolidation windows may be closing.
recent_film_proof: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004)

label: Learning Transfer Mechanisms
primary_fear: Learning in one domain does not transfer to others — meaning education may be more specific and less generalizable than believed.

label: Synesthesia Brain Basis
primary_fear: Some brains cross-wire sensation in ways that suggest consciousness may be far stranger than ordinary experience.

label: Near-Death Experience Mechanisms
primary_fear: Brain activity at death may enable genuine perception of another reality, not hallucination.

label: UFO Physics Null Explanation
primary_fear: Documented military encounters with objects defying physics remain unexplained after declassification.
recent_film_proof: Close Encounters of the Third Kind (1977)

label: Room-Temperature Superconductor Verification
primary_fear: Multiple labs have reported room-temp superconductivity, and if true, it rewrites physics.

label: Fusion Reactor Timescale
primary_fear: Fusion has been 30 years away for 50 years—the timeline problem may be fundamental.
recent_film_proof: Back to the Future Part II (1989)

label: Geothermal Scaling Limits
primary_fear: Geothermal energy is clean but scaling it triggers earthquakes and requires drilling deeper than we can.

label: Hydrogen Storage Technology
primary_fear: Hydrogen fuel requires storage technology that doesn't yet exist at scale and may never be safe enough.

label: Battery Chemistry Limits
primary_fear: Lithium mining is approaching planetary boundaries, and replacements may not scale in time.

label: Carbon Capture Cost Ceiling
primary_fear: Direct air capture costs may never fall below $100/ton, making climate reversal financially impossible.

label: Ocean Alkalinity Enhancement Scale
primary_fear: Artificially neutralizing ocean acidification could trigger cascading ecological collapse.

label: Direct Air Capture Energy Paradox
primary_fear: Removing carbon from the air requires so much energy that the cure may be worse than the disease.

label: Methane Sink Collapse Risk
primary_fear: Thawing permafrost releasing methane could initiate runaway feedback loop warming.

label: Permafrost Thaw Irreversibility
primary_fear: Once permafrost thaws, it may never refreeze within human civilization's lifespan.

label: AMOC Collapse Cascades
primary_fear: The Atlantic meridional overturning circulation could shut down within decades, freezing Europe.

label: Antarctic WAIS Tipping Point
primary_fear: West Antarctic Ice Sheet collapse is accelerating and may be unstoppable, raising sea level meters.

label: Insect Biomass Collapse
primary_fear: Insect populations have fallen 75% in decades, and ecology models predict cascading famine.

label: Soil Carbon Depletion
primary_fear: Agricultural soil is losing carbon and fertility faster than it can regenerate.

label: Oceanic Dead Zones Expansion
primary_fear: Hypoxic zones in oceans are expanding rapidly, potentially collapsing fish populations.

label: AMOC Collapse Trigger
primary_fear: The Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation is closer to irreversible collapse than climate models predict, threatening rapid cooling across the Northern Hemisphere.

label: Antarctic WAIS Stability
primary_fear: The West Antarctic Ice Sheet could destabilize faster than projected, raising global sea levels by meters within decades.

label: Permafrost Methane Tipping
primary_fear: Thawing permafrost is releasing methane at rates that may trigger runaway warming feedback loops beyond human control.

label: Gut-Brain Axis Full Map
primary_fear: The gut microbiome directly controls mood and psychiatric states through unknown pathways, meaning mental illness may be a digestive disorder.

label: Alzheimer Cascade Cause
primary_fear: The precise molecular trigger initiating the amyloid cascade in Alzheimer's disease remains unknown despite decades of failed billion-dollar drug trials.

label: Longevity Senolytics Limits
primary_fear: Whether clearing senescent cells can actually extend healthy human lifespan has not been proven in humans, despite dramatic animal results.

label: Long-COVID Persistence Mechanism
primary_fear: The biological mechanism behind long-COVID's persistent neurological and chronic fatigue symptoms remains unidentified, affecting an estimated 65 million people.

label: Cancer Immunotherapy Resistance
primary_fear: Some cancers become inexplicably resistant to checkpoint inhibitor immunotherapy through mechanisms not yet understood.

label: Near-Death Experience Physics
primary_fear: Near-death experiences may indicate consciousness persisting outside the brain, threatening our entire materialist model of mind and death.

label: Room-Temperature Superconductor
primary_fear: A practical room-temperature superconductor would render much of the global energy infrastructure obsolete and no one knows if it is physically possible.

label: Fusion Energy Economics
primary_fear: Whether commercial fusion power can be economically competitive with solar and wind before 2050 is unproven, despite the B already invested.

label: Solid-State Battery Dendrite
primary_fear: Lithium dendrite formation in solid-state batteries at scale remains unsolved, blocking the electric vehicle energy density breakthrough.

label: Hydrogen Storage Material
primary_fear: A cheap, safe, high-density solid-state hydrogen storage material for transport does not exist, delaying the hydrogen economy by decades.

label: Carbon Capture Cost Floor
primary_fear: The thermodynamic minimum cost of direct air carbon capture may be too high for it to ever reach climate-relevant scale affordably.

label: Depression Predictive Biomarker
primary_fear: No blood biomarker reliably predicts major depressive episodes before onset, meaning psychiatric crises cannot be anticipated and prevented.

label: Addiction Neural Basis
primary_fear: The precise neural circuit changes that make addiction self-perpetuating despite motivated abstinence are not fully mapped, leaving treatment incomplete.

label: Sleep Consolidation Mechanism
primary_fear: The exact molecular mechanism by which REM sleep consolidates episodic memory into permanent storage is not understood.
recent_film_proof: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind (2004)

label: Anesthesia Consciousness Mechanism
primary_fear: General anesthesia eliminates consciousness through a mechanism no one understands, meaning we routinely induce a state we cannot scientifically explain.

label: Quantum Bird Navigation
primary_fear: Whether European robins use quantum-coherent radical pairs for magnetic navigation challenges our assumption that quantum biology is irrelevant to life.

label: Prion Misfolding Spontaneous Trigger
primary_fear: What causes a normal prion protein to spontaneously misfold into a lethal pathogenic form in sporadic CJD is completely unknown.
